title: Solutions to make defense contracting easier
description: We make defense contracting easier for our DoW customers and companies delivering national security solutions.
text:
Why DIU?
We are the only Department of War organization focused exclusively on fielding and scaling commercial technology across the U.S. military to help solve critical problems. DIU has lowered barriers to entry into the defense market for commercial companies driving innovation in emerging and foundational technology areas. DIU leverages Other Transaction authority (10 USC 4022) to award prototype agreements in as few as 60-90 days.
Our team works with our Department partners and companies every step of the way. We help our DoW partners translate national security challenges into problem statements that draw in the best potential commercial solutions and guide the companies we work with through the process to a defense contract award. From the first time a potential DoW partner reaches out to us with a challenge to the moment a new technology is fielded, the DIU team is there to facilitate easy collaboration between our DoW partners and commercial vendors and execute prototype projects with speed and agility. Through this approach, we have increased the U.S. military’s access to critical artificial intelligence, machine learning, autonomy, cyber, energy, human systems, and space capabilities that are essential to our defense.
Vendors that execute a prototyping project to the satisfaction of the sponsoring Government customer and their contract commitments are awarded a Success Memo. The Success Memo enables vendors to do business with any Federal Government Agency, including the DoW, without having to go up for a competitive bid. There is no time restriction on the use of the Success Memo.
